Mobile App Development

Mobile App Development Company for Customer Engagement & Revenue

Mobile app development is ideal for businesses building high-performance iOS/Android apps with push notifications, payments, and offline functionality. We build apps that users return to daily.

Direct access to your users
High-performance interaction
Enhanced retention & revenue
Get Free Consultation Explore Portfolio
90% Open Rate
Native Payments

Proven with enterprises like

Service Overview

Mobile app development creates native iOS and Android applications that power direct customer relationships. E-Multitech Solution Pvt. Ltd. delivers apps with push notifications, in-app purchases, location services, and offline access.

We have built applications handling real daily active users where performance and reliability directly impact revenue. This results in direct revenue channels, reduced acquisition costs, and sustained engagement.

Explore Our Portfolio

Problems This
Service Solves

Generic mobile solutions often fail under real-world pressure. We build for stability.

Notification Failures

Solves push notifications failing to re-engage users, which typically leads to low retention rates.

Store Rejections

Eliminates high rejection rates from generic cross-platform tools that lack native store quality.

Resource Drain

Prevents apps from crashing or draining battery under real-world usage like background activity.

Web Performance Gaps

Fixes the issue of web apps losing customers due to poor mobile responsiveness and limitations.

Our Approach

We start with user journey mapping across devices, then build native iOS/Android apps with platform-specific optimizations.

Specialized Expertise

We excel in native development with battery-efficient location tracking and reliable push delivery. Your app launches store-ready with retention systems built in.

See Custom Software for backend integration

What You Get

Native performance meets revenue-focused functionality.

Native Core

iOS and Android apps fully optimized for their respective platform hardware.

Push Systems

Advanced notification systems with segmentation and delivery optimization logic.

In-App Revenue

Seamless purchase and subscription payment flows for consistent revenue generation.

Offline Sync

Intelligent data syncing allowing functionality even without active internet connections.

Proven Apps We’ve Built

Native applications designed for daily engagement and peak performance.

Ride-Sharing Apps

Stable performance during peak usage with real-time tracking, optimized battery consumption, and driver matching.

Real-Time Booking

Native platforms with calendar sync, push confirmations, and reliable offline access for service industries.

Consumer Services

Consumer Services

Shopping apps with personalized campaigns, loyalty programs, and native performance for high conversions.

View Full Portfolio

Why Choose eMultiTech for Mobile?

Aspect Freelancer Large Agency E-Multitech Solution
Cost Low rates, store rejections High minimums, long timelines Store-ready pricing, fast approval
Performance Cross-platform compromises Enterprise-only focus Native iOS/Android optimization
Retention Basic notifications Template approaches Push + engagement systems
Support Launch-only delivery Expensive updates App performance monitoring included

Risk Reversal & IP Guarantee

You own 100% of the app code and IP from day one. Our delivery includes 6 months of post-launch support covering all critical updates and crash fixes.

App data security follows platform-level encryption and secure storage standards.

Mobile App FAQ

Building for the palm of your customer's hand requires strategy.

Choose native when you need push notifications, in-app payments, offline functionality, or high performance that web apps cannot provide.

Typically 3–5 months for a single-platform MVP and 6–9 months for dual-platform apps with advanced features.

$25,000–$60,000 for single-platform and $50,000–$120,000 for dual-platform depending on complexity.

We use native development with device-specific testing, optimizing for battery, memory, and background processes.

Build mobile apps that users rely on daily—not ones they uninstall.
